castle.strategic_description: This civ is versatile, with strength across ranged and infantry -- allowing flexible strategies that adapt to any opponent. Strong infantry anti-cavalry with Pikeman to hold defensive positions against cavalry pushes. Good tools against ranged units help shut down archer compositions. An infantry ram push is the signature play -- use Warrior Priest as a meatshield to protect rams pushing into enemy bases.

imperial.strategic_description: This civ is versatile, with strength across ranged and infantry -- allowing flexible strategies that adapt to any opponent. Strong infantry anti-cavalry with Halberdier to hold defensive positions against cavalry pushes. Good tools against ranged units help shut down archer compositions. Siege options are limited -- look to win through open-field engagements rather than pushing fortifications.
